text:
Once upon a time in a quaint little village lived a curious boy named Oliver. He had dreams bigger than any owl's treasure. Every night, before bed, he would sneak out under the moonlight.

One particular night, Oliver climbed up an old oak statue près de Montagne Orchard. He looked down at the whispers of apples. He thought maybe they knew secrets.

Then something fluffy landed on his head. Slowly, he opened one eye.

A duck.

He talked.

"Dooooo you think I could find something?"

The duck quacked thoughtfully.

"I wouldn.

There was a great big owl.

Now big stars.

Yeah!"

He darted. She followed.

Into the forest.

Around a little rock.

Oh honey.

There you are.

There I am.

You've lost.

You find.

We've honey moon.

Let's go together.

Oliver climbed fast.

They flew.

Tomorrow never late.

Oh wow.

Let's do it!

Maybe.

Yeah!<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|>
